value.found_quote:
### Creating an eval run

With our test data in place, let's evaluate a prompt and see how it performs against our test criteria. Via API, we can do this by [creating an eval run](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/api-reference/evals/createRun).
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes creating an eval run via the Evals API, with full code examples. However, it also states "OpenAI is deprecating the Evals platform," with evals becoming read-only on October 31, 2026 and the platform scheduled to shut down on November 30, 2026 — so the offering exists but is being retired, making the lifecycle status deprecated.
